name: Green Spirit
descs: After hitting a non-Staggered enemy by using a Gluttony Affinity Skill, or inflicting [Vibration] Potency using Skill effects, randomly inflict a total of 4 [Vibration] Potency between all enemies(or all Abnormality parts).

After hitting a non-Staggered enemy by using a Gluttony Affinity Skill, or inflicting [Vibration] Potency using Skill effects, randomly inflict a total of 6 [Vibration] Potency between all enemies(or all Abnormality parts).

After hitting a non-Staggered enemy by using a Gluttony Affinity Skill, or inflicting [Vibration] Potency using Skill effects, randomly inflict a total of 8 [Vibration] Potency between all enemies(or all Abnormality parts).
